Time: 2026

« Scenario: —)

He thought he had buried them long ago. Those who had always been dear to him. The one he had never admitted was dear to him, deep down in his heart. He was too convinced that affection was a weakness. So he just kept silent. He kept silent and mourned, waking up at night from another nightmare involving them. Until he saw them there. They were walking away from the base, their figure still recognizable. The light fell in such a way that these eyes were visible even in the dark. Beautiful... They belonged only to them... After that, he convinced Laswell to dig through the documents and find more information about them. Thus, he found himself outside with flowers, standing out among the other guys who were waiting for the love of their lives. It was 11:58 pm... And when they left the airport building, the clock struck exactly 12. From the outside, Simon looked like a puppy in love... Huh.
creator: AnimeTyanka
